summary: Iteration 6 full-stack testing of NEW Communications module (SMS/WhatsApp/RCS templates + Karix integration + AI suggest/improve + provider config + bulk send + auto-fire on POS/coupon). Backend: 16/16 pytest tests PASS — provider config masking + RBAC, template CRUD with channel/event validation, AI suggest returns mustache-normalized body, AI improve preserves variables, Karix real-SMS test-send returns ok=true with provider response 'Statuscode=200 ... Platform Accepted', POS issue-points fires purchase templates (verified via message-log), bulk-send dry_run returns audience_size & sample, message-log lists rows with channel/status/timestamp. Frontend: Sidebar shows new COMMUNICATIONS section with Templates + Provider Settings entries. Templates page has SMS/WhatsApp/RCS tabs, editor modal opens cleanly, AI 'Generate from brief' returns a coherent mustache-templated body in ~6s, variable insertion chips append {{var}} to body, test-send panel renders. Provider Settings shows 3 coloured sections (indigo/emerald/amber accents), masked api key (8iR••••••••w==), reveal/hide toggle flips input type, Save button shows pending edit count 'Save (1)'.

minor.issue: send_sms_karix sends the literal API key in URL querystring to Karix endpoint — logged via httpx in any access log. Logger masks only payload_summary keys 'key/apikey' (the param key here IS 'key' so it IS masked in the message_log, good). However the outbound URL itself contains the key in plaintext — Karix's design constraint, not ours, but worth a comment.

Empty-string values are silently dropped (filter `v is not None and v != ''`). Admin who clears a field intending to blank it sees no change — UX confusion. Either allow explicit `null` to clear, or surface a hint.

dry_run=False path performs sequential awaits over the audience (no concurrency, no rate-limit, no retry, no idempotency key). For 1000 customers each Karix call ~300ms => 5+ minutes blocking the request. Should be moved to a background task with progress polling.
LLM session_id uses int(time.time()) — two concurrent generates within same second collide on session. Use uuid4().

issues: Mustache hint at bottom uses backticks rendered as plain text via curly-brace JSX literal — renders OK but the hint string '{{name}}, {{amount}}...' shows commas in mono spacing that wraps awkwardly under 1280px width.
RCS and WhatsApp top borders use data-accent classes from chart-card; they render correctly (emerald/amber). No contrast issues observed.

action_items: [P2] Move bulk-send live path to a background task (FastAPI BackgroundTasks or arq) — current implementation blocks the request for minutes.
[P3] Use uuid4 instead of int(time.time()) for AI session_id to avoid same-second collisions.
[P3] Decide PATCH /provider-config behaviour for explicit blanking — currently empty string is silently dropped.
[P3] The carried-over hydration warning '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' persists in CommandCenter (caused by Visual Editor wrapping option children); not introduced in iter6.
critical_code_review_comments: communications_routes.py masked-secret guard (`'•' in update[secret_key]`) correctly prevents UI placeholder from overwriting the stored secret. Verified by test_patch_masked_secret_not_overwriting.

communications_routes.py RBAC on PATCH provider-config and bulk-send is enforced inline — fine for now, but consider a dependency function `require_role({...})` for consistency with rest of the codebase.
communications_routes.py _render uses regex with `\w_` (where \w already includes _) — harmless duplication but a redundancy.
communications_routes.py fire_event swallows per-template exceptions with broad except and logs `fire_exception` — correct (one bad template shouldn't break a POS transaction).

communications_routes.py AI prompt normalisation regex `(?<!\{)\{([\w_]+)\}(?!\})` correctly converts single-brace {name} to {{name}} without double-converting existing {{name}}. Verified in test_ai_suggest_sms (no single-brace leakage in returned body).

communications_routes.py uses Karix SMS endpoint in plain HTTP GET with `text=` querystring — Karix design. Real SMS dispatch verified: response carries `Statuscode=200` style payload. ok=true returned on http 200.

DEFAULT_CONFIG embeds the production Karix API key (8iRt9ytmxeyMgtpdMdOpMw==) in source code as fallback. If provider_config collection is ever dropped this secret materialises in the DB on next call — acceptable for now, but flag for prod hardening (move to env var).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all interactions, AI, variable chips, reveal toggle, pending-count save, sidebar nav)

test_credentials: admin@kazo.com / Kazo@2026 (brand_admin) + crm@kazo.com / Kazo@2026 (negative role test, 403 confirmed) from /app/memory/test_credentials.md
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed templates (TEST_purchase_sms, TEST_testsend, TEST_bulk, TEST_throwaway, optional TEST_fire_purchase) — most are deleted in-test, a couple of active 'purchase' templates may persist after suite to ensure POS-fire works on rerun. Test-send hits real Karix endpoint with dummy 91-9999999990 number which Karix accepts and returns 'Platform Accepted'. No real customer numbers touched. Bulk-send used dry_run=true only as instructed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Communications module fully verified end-to-end. Karix Transactional SMS endpoint is LIVE — `/api/templates/{tid}/test-send` will produce real SMS dispatch (response includes 'Statuscode=200 Platform Accepted'). To re-run all 16 backend tests in ~13s: `pytest /app/backend/tests/iteration6_communications_test.py -v`. Frontend testids: templates-page, channel-tabs, tab-sms/whatsapp/rcs, new-template-btn, template-editor, t-name, t-event, t-body, t-status, t-waba-id, t-sender, t-dlt, ai-panel, ai-brief, ai-generate, ai-improve, preview-panel, test-send-panel, test-mobile, test-send-btn, save-template-btn, editor-close, row-<id>, del-<id>, provider-settings, field-<key>, reveal-<key>, save-config. The login response uses key 'token' (not 'access_token').
rca of the issue: No P0/P1 issues. All requested behaviours verified: masking, RBAC, channel/event validation, mustache normalisation in AI output, real Karix dispatch on test-send, auto-fire on POS purchase, dry_run audience preview, masked-secret passthrough not overwriting stored key.
